summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin system for upmuch CRM. Backend APIs working excellently (91.7% success rate), admin dashboard fully functional with all features operational.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 when user is already an affiliate
minor_issues.impact: Expected validation behavior - not a bug

ui_bugs.issue: Login form submission not redirecting to dashboard after successful authentication

passed_tests: Super admin login API (200 OK with super_admin role)
Admin stats endpoint (users: 7, orgs: 5, revenue: €0, affiliates: 1, discount codes: 3)
Admin users list (7 users with role management)
Discount codes list and creation (CRUD working)
Affiliates list and three-tier commission structure
Admin dashboard UI with all tabs functional
Users tab with table and role management
Discount Codes tab with create dialog
Affiliates tab with three-tier structure display
All admin stat cards displaying correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend login form redirect issue - login API works but form doesn't redirect to dashboard after successful authentication. All other super admin features are fully functional.
